markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demonstrate the functionality and data flow of a new recording dashboard for content performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Custom dashboard integrates data from Google Search Console, Analytics, and Ahrefs to track content performance metrics (impressions, clicks, CTR, rankings)](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Automated weekly reporting process feeds into a Looker studio visualization for easy client access](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Current limitations: Ahrefs data accuracy issues, manual steps for weekly updates, ongoing refinement of branded keyword filtering](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)

## Topics

### Data Sources and Integration

  - [Primary sources: Google Search Console, Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Secondary source: Ahrefs (currently used for backlink data, accuracy concerns noted)](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Custom formulas pull data from these sources into a master spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Google Search Console data retrieved using "Search Analytics for Sheets" extension](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Filters applied to focus on blog content and remove branded keywords](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Metrics Tracked

  - [Impressions, clicks, CTR (Click-Through Rate), and average position from Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Page views and organic traffic from Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Keyword rankings and positions (currently from Ahrefs, seeking improvement)](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Top keyword position per URL highlighted in the report](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Reporting Process

  - [Master report aggregates data from various sheets (impressions, CTR, position, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Weekly data report automatically sums data when date range is complete](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Manual step: Every Monday, copy and paste values to keep weekly data static](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Data flows into Looker Studio for visual dashboard creation](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

### Dashboard Features

  - [Week-on-week performance comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Filtering for recently published articles (within the last week)](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Scrollable view of all published articles with associated performance stats](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Custom date range selection for flexible reporting](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### Ongoing Improvements

  - [Addressing Ahrefs data accuracy issues for keyword positions](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Refining branded keyword filtering process](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Updating and maintaining data accuracy in Looker Studio visualizations](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate alternatives to Ahrefs for more accurate keyword position data](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Finalize branded keyword filtering to improve data cleanliness](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Automate the weekly data copy-paste process to reduce manual work](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Update Looker Studio dashboard with latest refinements and branded keyword exclusions](https://fathom.video/share/1NWh1ydusy321ybwERMmayNd3kJe-X45?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
